# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nodejs-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nodejs-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nodejs-service
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: nodejs-container
        image: your-nodejs-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        env:
        - name: MONGODB_URI
          value: your-mongodb-connection-string
